title: The Text of Marwan 's Letter to al-Ghamr
description: According to Ahmad (b. Zuhayr)-'Ali (b. Muhammad al-Madi'ini): Marwin wrote to al-Ghamr b. Yazid as follows: Now to the point. Truly this caliphate is from God and follows the paths laid down by the prophethood' 060 of His messengers and the establishment of the precepts of His religion. God has blessed the caliphs by that with which He has invested them, honoring them (thereby) and honoring those who honor them.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 26
